body.title: Migrate slash-style comms:// addresses to suffix-style + router resolves dot-separated suffixes
body.result: Router.resolve() peels suffix-style addresses (longest-prefix-wins). Router.extract_surface() exposes the qualifier. skeleton/stub migrated from slash-style. 5 new tests; 134 passed. Closes T-comms-device-router-mismatch. agent_datacenter commit 0ed4a75.
body.description:
Existing devices use slash-style comms:// (skeleton/inbox, stub/inbox) but announce-protocol surface_addresses use suffix-style (box.n.surface). Migrate the 3 slash sites to suffix-style and teach the router to resolve dot-separated suffix variants (comms://igor-wild-0001.console → primary mailbox of igor-wild-0001 with surface=console tagged on the envelope). Closes T-comms-device-router-mismatch as side effect — once skeleton.comms() emits suffix-form, IgorDevice.comms() addresses resolve cleanly through the router. Per § 14 decision 11.A.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/skeleton/skeleton.py (lines 61, 247), /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/tests/fixtures/stub_devices.py (line 40), /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/bus/router.py (resolve() to handle dot suffixes), /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/tests/test_bus.py (assertions on resolve() suffix behavior)
**Design rules:** § 14 decision 11.A (suffix-style flat addressing); router treats path as opaque mailbox name + optional dot-separated surface qualifier
**Scope boundary:** in — convert 3 slash-style sites to suffix-style; router.resolve() returns base mailbox for suffix variants; tests updated. Out — surface-multiplexing (separate mailboxes per surface), announce wiring (slice 2 ticket #2), new device endpoints, schema changes.
**Test plan:** test_bus.py: resolve('comms://x.y.z') returns 'x' (prefix mailbox), resolve('comms://x') returns 'x' (no suffix), resolve('comms://nonexistent.foo') still raises. New: test_router_extracts_surface_from_suffix asserts surface qualifier propagates as envelope metadata. Update test_device_contract.py expectations. Existing 129 tests must stay green.
